Title: vd_remote_proc_wrapper
Feature: varcharvd_remote_proc_wrapper(dsn, remote_name, local_name, metadata, status_code, error_message, make_resultset, description)
Description: Creating a PL wrapper for remote procedure execution
This is to create a PL stored procedure to execute a Remote Stored Procedures. It returns results as a SQL result set as well as an array(vector) depending of the 'make_resultset' flag.
